description.to:
## Summary
Implement one canonical class-list resolver from champion score YAML.

## Purpose
Provide a single source of truth for class labels used by associated-dataset balancing.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Resolver extracts class list deterministically from champion score YAML.
- Fail-fast error when class list cannot be resolved.
- No alternate class-source fallback path is introduced.
- Tests cover success and fail-fast behavior.
